business.name: <BUSINESS_NAME>
business._note: Business facts (hours/phone/prices/delivery) live in skills/customer-service/business.md — verify with the owner before real use.

whatsapp._note: require_mention=false lets the bot see uncaptioned images (needed for the complaint-photo workflow).

compensation_policy._doc: Freshness-complaint compensation policy. Read by tools/lib/policy.mjs (deterministic, unit-tested).

sheet._note: When enabled=false, cases are written only to data/cases/cases.jsonl. To enable the Google Sheet tracker, deploy tools/apps-script-webhook.gs and put the /exec URL here with enabled=true.
